code:
from collections import deque

class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None

def levelOrder(root):
    if not root:
        return

    q = deque()
    q.append(root)

    while q:
        node = q.popleft()
        print(node.val, end=" ")

        if node.left:
            q.append(node.left)
        if node.right:
            q.append(node.right)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Örnek Kullanım:
    #      1
    #     / \
    #    2   3
    #   / \   \
    #  4   5   6
    
    root = Node(1)
    root.left = Node(2)
    root.right = Node(3)
    root.left.left = Node(4)
    root.left.right = Node(5)
    root.right.right = Node(6)

    print("Level Order Traversal:")
    levelOrder(root) # Çıktı: 1 2 3 4 5 6
prompt: Level order traversal using queue yaz.
